top_signals.title: UK ratchets up nuclear spending, with new warhead and delivery planes in the works
top_signals.summary: Central to the current package is Astraea, the warhead designated A21/Mk7 that the Atomic Weapons Establishment has been developing since 2020.

top_signals.title: World Cup Muni Spending An Accelerator: Kleinman
top_signals.summary: Margot Kleinman, head of municipal research & portfolio manager at Nuveen, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Municipal bonds helped 11 US World Cup Host Cities fund upgrades to transportation hubs, airports, and enhance security. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
